    C

    CpuTicksBenchmark - Class in oshi.benchmark
    Side-by-side benchmarks of JNA vs FFM implementations of CentralProcessor.getProcessorCpuLoadTicks().

    F

    ffm() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.CpuTicksBenchmark
    Benchmarks the FFM implementation of CentralProcessor.getProcessorCpuLoadTicks().
    ffm() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.ProcessesBenchmark
    Benchmarks the FFM implementation of OperatingSystem.getProcesses().
    ffm(Blackhole) - Method in class oshi.benchmark.FileStoreBenchmark
    Benchmarks the FFM implementation of OSFileStore.updateAttributes().
    ffm(Blackhole) - Method in class oshi.benchmark.MemoryBenchmark
    Benchmarks the FFM implementation of memory and virtual-memory queries.
    ffm(Blackhole) - Method in class oshi.benchmark.NetworkIFBenchmark
    Benchmarks the FFM implementation of NetworkIF.updateAttributes().

    J

    jna() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.CpuTicksBenchmark

    O

    oshi.benchmark - package oshi.benchmark
    JMH benchmarks comparing JNA and FFM implementations of OSHI hardware and operating-system queries.
    oshi.benchmark.jmh_generated - package oshi.benchmark.jmh_generated
     

    P

    ProcessesBenchmark - Class in oshi.benchmark

    S

    setup() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.CpuTicksBenchmark
    Initializes JNA and FFM CentralProcessor instances with memoization disabled.
    setup() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.FileStoreBenchmark
    Initializes JNA and FFM OSFileStore lists with memoization disabled.
    setup() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.MemoryBenchmark
    Initializes JNA and FFM GlobalMemory and VirtualMemory instances with memoization disabled.
    setup() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.NetworkIFBenchmark
    Initializes JNA and FFM NetworkIF lists with memoization disabled.
    setup() - Method in class oshi.benchmark.ProcessesBenchmark
    Initializes JNA and FFM OperatingSystem instances.
